title: # |[ FX_UNIT_G0D_MODEL ]|
content:
# |[ FX_UNIT_G0D_MODEL ]|

Each FX = symbolic god with narrative behavior

| FX | GOD-NAME | SYSTEM ROLE |
|-----------|------------------|--------------------------------------|
| FILTER | The Divider | Cuts thought noise |
| COMPRESS | The Enforcer | Smooths chaos |
| KNEE | The Softbreaker | Breaks gently |
| GATE | The Gatekeeper | On/off permission logic |
| REVERB | The Veil | Adds distance & etherealism |
| GLITCH | The Screamer | Distorts truth, triggers breaks |
| GRANULAR | The Particle Oracle | Memory fractalization |
| VOCODER | Mouth of Many | AI/character hybrid voice |
| SHIMMER | Angel’s Path | Divine accent, shimmered delay |
| FORMANT | The Shapeshifter | Vowel morph / identity warp |
